UnitAbilities.Title: Deadshot
UnitAbilities.Text:
When this unit is selected to shoot, until this unit has shot:
▪ Enemy units do not have Lone Operative.
▪ Hidden enemy units have +15" detection range.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shieldbreaker
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when selecting targets for this model's exitus rifle, it can fire a shieldbreaker round, If it does, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack with that weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll and any successful Wound roll scores a Critical Wound.

Infos.Title: SHADOW ASSIGNMENT
Infos.Text:
This model cannot be selected to be your Warlord.

If your army faction is Agents of the Imperium, then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different Officio Assassinorum model, provided the total points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing a model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 Vindicare Assassin, it cannot have more than 1 Culexus Assassin, it cannot have more than 1 Eversor Assassin and it cannot have more than 1 Callidus Assassin).

Weapons.Name: Exitus pistol
Weapons.Keywords: DEVASTATING WOUNDS, IGNORES COVER, PISTOL, PRECISION

Weapons.Name: Exitus rifle
Weapons.Keywords: DEVASTATING WOUNDS, IGNORES COVER, HEAVY, PRECISION

UnitAbilities.Title: Etheric Emergence
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an etheric emergence. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Abomination
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Feel No Pain 2+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Soulless Horror
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, this model can use this ability, If it does, each enemy Unit within 9" of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test (or subtracting 2 if that unit is a Psyker).

Infos.Title: SHADOW ASSIGNMENT
Infos.Text:
This model cannot be selected to be your Warlord.

If your army faction is Agents of the Imperium, then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different Officio Assassinorum model, provided the total points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing a model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 Vindicare Assassin, it cannot have more than 1 Culexus Assassin, it cannot have more than 1 Eversor Assassin and it cannot have more than 1 Callidus Assassin).

UnitAbilities.Title: Frenzon
UnitAbilities.Text: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: Overkill
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in your Movement phase, this model can use this ability before it makes a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, add 6" to this model's Move characteristic and add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's melee weapons.

Infos.Title: SHADOW ASSIGNMENT
Infos.Text:
This model cannot be selected to be your Warlord.

If your army faction is Agents of the Imperium, then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different Officio Assassinorum model, provided the total points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing a model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 Vindicare Assassin, it cannot have more than 1 Culexus Assassin, it cannot have more than 1 Eversor Assassin and it cannot have more than 1 Callidus Assassin).

UnitAbilities.Title: Reign of Confusion
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12” of this model with a stratagem, this model can use this ability. If you do increase the CP cost of that use of that stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Acrobatic Escape
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Infos.Title: SHADOW ASSIGNMENT
Infos.Text:
This model cannot be selected to be your Warlord.

If your army faction is Agents of the Imperium, then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different Officio Assassinorum model, provided the total points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing a model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 Vindicare Assassin, it cannot have more than 1 Culexus Assassin, it cannot have more than 1 Eversor Assassin and it cannot have more than 1 Callidus Assassin).

UnitAbilities.Title: Healing Serum
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding Characters) to the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Backroom Deals
UnitAbilities.Text: if your army contains one or more units with this ability, during the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of those units. While the selected unit is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warrant of Trade
UnitAbilities.Text: If your army includes one or more units with this ability, after both players have deployed thew armies, select up to D3 Imperium Battleline units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Masters of Close Confines
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Infos.Title: Navy Bodyguard
Infos.Text: If your Army Faction is not Agents of the Imperium, then for each Voidfarers Character unit you include in your army, you can include one Voidsmen-at-Arms unit in your army that does not count towards the number of Retinue units your army can include (see Assigned Agents, page 75).

UnitAbilities.Title: Endurant Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Breaching Team
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gholatskull
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when you select this unit as the targot of the Grenade Stratagem, you can target one enemy unit visible to and within 18" of this unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army, instead of one within 8".

UnitAbilities.Title: CAT Unit
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models In this unit gain the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place one Gheistskull and one CAT Unit token next to this unit, removing each token once the relevant ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dedication to Duty
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nuncio Aquila
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, you can select one objective marker within 6" of the bearer. All enemy units (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Each objective marker can only be targeted b ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place one Nuncio-aquila token next to the bearer, removing it once it uses this ability.

Options: Arbites combat shotgun and excruciator maul
Arbites combat shotgun and Arbites medi-kit
Arbites combat shotgun and soulguilt scanner

UnitAbilities.Title: Imperial Law
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent's army, Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

UnitAbilities.Title: Arbites Medi-kit
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer’s unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Exaction Vigilants to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nuncio Aquila
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, you can select one objective marker within 6" of the bearer. All enemy units (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Each objective marker can only be targeted by this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place one Nuncio-aquila token next to the bearer, removing it once it uses this ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Soulguilt Scanner
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Merciless Judgement
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nuncio Aquila
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, you can select one objective marker within 6" of the bearer. All enemy units (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Each objective marker can only be targeted by this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place one Nuncio-aquila token next to the bearer, removing it once it uses this ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Authority of the Inquisition
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, it can embark within any Transport that its Bodyguard unit can embark within.

UnitAbilities.Title: Xenos Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding Imperium and Chaos units), add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Veil (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, this Psyker can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, this Psyker’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your next Command phase, this Psyker’s unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

UnitAbilities.Title: Authority of the Inquisition
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, it can embark within any Transport that its Bodyguard unit can embark within.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malefic Wardings (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save, and a 4+ invulnerable save against Psychic Attacks and attacks made by Daemon models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Spy Network
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time your opponent gains a CP as the result of an ability, roll one D6: on a 2+, you also gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Glovodan Psyber-eagle
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of the bearer. Until the  start of your next Command phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Glovodan Psyber-eagle token next to the selected unit to remind you.

UnitAbilities.Title: Authority of the Inquisition
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, it can embark within any Transport that its Bodyguard unit can embark within.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psyoculum
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ANTI-PSYKER 4+] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: No Mercy
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blessed Wardings
UnitAbilities.Text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Gifts
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Psyker keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Authority of the Inquisition
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, it can embark within any Transport that its Bodyguard unit can embark within.

UnitAbilities.Title: Power of the Rosette
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this model’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Inquisitorial Henchmen
UnitAbilities.Text: If your Army Faction is not Agents of the Imperium, then for each Inquisitor unit you include in your army, you can include one Inquisitorial Agents unit in your army that does not count towards the number of Retinue units your army can include (see Assigned Agents, page 75).

UnitAbilities.Title: Tome-skull
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle for each Tome-skull this unit is equipped with, at the start of any phase, you can select either one friendly Agents of the Imperium unit that is Battle-shocked and within 6" of this unit or one enemy unit within 6" of this unit. If you select a friendly unit, that unitis no longer Battle-shocked. If you select an enemy unit, it mus take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place the appropriate number of Tome-skull tokens next to the unit at the start of the battle, removing each time this unit uses this ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strategic Knowledge
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Battle
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tactical Instinct
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unstoppable Champion
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 1 wound remaining.

UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death to the Alien
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack does not have the Imperium or Chaos keywords, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blackstar Cluster Launcher
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Auspex Array
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Infernum Halo-launcher
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Smoke keyword.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Deathwatch Infantry models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Holy Hatred
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Zealot
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 3.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rapid Deployment
UnitAbilities.Text: Units can disembark from this transport after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 13 Inquisitor Infantry and Inquisitorial Agent models. It cannot transport Terminator models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Self Repair
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Agents of the Imperium Infantry models. It cannot transport Terminator or Officio Assassinorum models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Defenders of the Faith
UnitAbilities.Text: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Incensor Cherub
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Strategem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Incensor Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Simulacrum Imperialis
UnitAbilities.Text: Improve the Leadership characteristic of models in the bearer's unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Purge and Cleanse
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 Ordo Hereticus Infantry models.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one Sisters of Battle Squad from your army, If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a nate of which models form each of the two new units), One of these units must start the battle embarked within this Transport; the other can start the battle embarked within another Transport, or it can be deployed as a Separate unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ancient’s Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Narthecium
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding Characters) to the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hammerhand (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Infos.Title: RITES OF TELEPORTATION
Infos.Text: If one or more Inquisitor units are attached to this unit during the Declare Battle formations step, models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gaze into the Empyrean (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Enemy units that are  Set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Third Eye (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Shooting phase, Select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 2 from the result if itis an Infantry unit. If the test is failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

ministorum hand flamer and close combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Ministorum Sermon
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains a Ministorum Priest, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cherub
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer's Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Salvationist Medikit
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding Character models) to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Simulacrum Imperialis
UnitAbilities.Text: Improve the Leadership characteristic of models in the bearer's unit by 1.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Ministorum Priest or Inquisitor model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Sisters of Battle Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead. If a Ministorum Priest or Inquisitor model from your army is attached to this unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, that model gains the Scouts 6" ability.

Units.Name: AQUILA KILL TEAM

Options: hellstorm bolt rifle and Astartes grenade launcher

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Deathwatch Veteran with stalker bolt rifle
Deathwatch Veteran with marksman bolt carbine

UnitAbilities.Title: Death to the Alien
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack does not have the Imperium or Chaos keywords, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Astartes Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Kill Team
UnitAbilities.Text:
Each time an attack targets this unit, if it contains models with different Toughness characteristics, until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, use the Toughness characteristic of the majority of the models in that unit when determining what roll is required for that attack to successfully wound. If two or more Toughness characteristics are tied for majority, use the highest value.

For the purposes of determining which models in this unit can embark within a Transport, Gravis Veteran models take up the space of 2 models, but can otherwise embark within any Transport their unit can embark within, even though similar models in other units have the Gravis keyword.

Designer’s Note: While the abstractions in the above rule cause some models to behave differently to similar models in other units, they are designed to minimise complicated Transport rules.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army can be attached to a Deathwatch Kill Team unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

Keywords: KILL TEAM SERGEANT AND DEATHWATCH VETERANS: Tacticus

Weapons.Name: Frag cannon
Weapons.Keywords: BLAST, HEAVY, LETHAL HITS, RAPID FIRE D3

UnitAbilities.Title: On My Signal, Fire!
UnitAbilities.Text: After this unit has shot, you can select one enemy unit hit by those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time an Agents of the Imperium or Imperium Infantry Battleline model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tox-cycler
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if this model scored a hit with its Jindarii tox-cycler, until the end of the battle, add 2 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of that weapon (to a maximum Damage characteristic of 6).

Rule.Title: DEATHWATCH MISSION TACTICS
Rule.Text:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Mission Tactics listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Mission Tactic is active and its effects apply to all Deathwatch units from your army. Each Mission Tactic can only be selected once per battle.

Furor Tactics
While this Mission Tactic is active, weapons equipped by Deathwatch units from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Malleus Tactics
While this Mission Tactic is active, weapons equipped by Deathwatch units from your army have the [LETHAL HITS} ability.

Purgatus Tactics
While this Mission Tactic is active, each time a Deathwatch model from your army makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

Stratagems.Name: ARMOUR OF CONTEMPT
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS ALIEN HUNTERS - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Deathwatch unit from your army that  was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: ADAPTIVE TACTICS
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS ALIEN HUNTERS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Deathwatch unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select the Furor Tactics, Malleus Tactics or Purgatus Tactics. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Deathwatch Mission Tactic is active for your unit instead of any other Deathwatch Mission Tactic that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Deathwatch Mission Tactic this battle.

Stratagems.Name: HELLFIRE ROUNDS
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS ALIEN HUNTERS - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Deathwatch Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons (excluding Devastating Wounds weapons) equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] abilities.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select any units that have already been targeted with either the Kraken Rounds or Dragonfire Rounds Stratagems this phase.

Stratagems.Name: DRAGONFIRE ROUNDS
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS ALIEN HUNTERS - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Deathwatch Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select any units that have already been targeted with either the Kraken Rounds or Hellfire Rounds Stratagems this phase.

Stratagems.Name: KRAKEN ROUNDS
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS ALIEN HUNTERS - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Deathwatch Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 and improve the Range characteristic of those weapons by 6".
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select any units that have already been targeted with either the Dragonfire Rounds or Hellfire Rounds Stratagems this phase.

Stratagems.Name: RAPID TACTICAL RELOCATION
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS ALIEN HUNTERS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Inquisitor or Deathwatch Infantry unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy models.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Enhancements.Name: Universal Anathema
Enhancements.Description: Agents of the Imperium model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] abilities.

Enhancements.Name: Blackweave Shroud
Enhancements.Description: Agents of the Imperium model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

Enhancements.Name: Beacon Angelis
Enhancements.Description: Watch Master model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

Enhancements.Name: Amulet of Auto-Chastisement
Enhancements.Description: Watch Master model only. At the start of your opponent's Shooting phase, select one enemy Vehicle unit (excluding Titanic units) within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

Rule.Title: ROOT OUT HERESY
Rule.Text:
Ranged weapons equipped by Adeptus Arbites, Inquisitor, Inquisitorial Agents and Ordo Hereticus models from your army have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Each time an Adeptus Arbites, Inquisitor, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Hereticus model from your army makes an attack that targets a Chaos unit containing 5 or more models, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Stratagems.Name: STUN GRENADES
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS PURGATION FORCE - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Start of any phase (excluding the Command phase).
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Arbites, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Hereticus Grenades unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters or Vehicles) within 8" of and visible to your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: DISPENSE JUSTICE
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS PURGATION FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Arbites, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Hereticus unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: INVIOLATE JURISDICTION
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS PURGATION FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Arbites, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Hereticus Infantry unit from your army within range of an objective marker and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Stratagems.Name: EXECUTION ORDER
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS PURGATION FORCE - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Arbites, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Hereticus Infantry unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy Character unit on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in your unit targets that Character unit, its weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

Stratagems.Name: LINE OF FIRE
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS PURGATION FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Arbites, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Hereticus unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can target enemy units that are within Engagement Range of one or more friendly units with ranged weapons (excluding Blast weapons), provided the target is within 12".

Stratagems.Name: EXACT PUNISHMENT
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS PURGATION FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an Agents of the Imperium unit from your army is destroyed as the result of an enemy unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Arbites, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Hereticus unit from your army that was within 6" of the destroyed unit (you cannot target the destroyed unit with the Stratagem).
Stratagems.Effect: After the attacking unit has shot, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

Enhancements.Name: Liber Heresius
Enhancements.Description: Inquisitor or Ministorum Priest model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Agents of the Imperium units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: No Escape (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Inquisitor model only. While an enemy unit is withi 6" of the bearer, each time it is selected to Fall Back it must first take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

Enhancements.Name: Witch Hunter
Enhancements.Description: Inquisitor or Ministorum Priest model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a Psyker unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Ignis Judicium
Enhancements.Description: Inquisitor or Ministorum Priest model only. The bearer’s ranged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS], [MELTA 1] and [PRECISION] abilities.

Rule.Title: DESTROY THE DAEMONIC
Rule.Text: Each time an Inquisitor, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Malleus model from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if the target of that attack is a Daemon unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: RITUAL OF WARDING
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS DAEMON HUNTERS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Start of any Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Inquisitor, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Malleus unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker is said to be Warded and remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent Controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective marker is Warded and under your control, enemy Daemon units cannot be set up on the battlefield within 6" of it.

Stratagems.Name: RITES OF EXORCISM
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS DAEMON HUNTERS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Inquisitor, Inquisitorial Agents or Ordo Malleus unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy Daemon unit within 12" and visible to your unit. That unit must take  a Battle-shock test. If that testis failed, then until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Agents of the Imperium unit makes an attack that targets that Daemon unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: STEEL HEART
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS DAEMON HUNTERS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Grey Knights Terminator Squad unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Grey Knights Terminator Squad unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unitis eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: TRUESILVER ARMOUR
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS DAEMON HUNTERS - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the  Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Grey Knights Terminator Squad unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: HEXAGRAMMIC WARDS
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS DAEMON HUNTERS - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected » its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Ordo Malleus unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, all Psychic weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: PSYBOLT AMMUNITION
Stratagems.Category: ORDO XENOS DAEMON HUNTERS - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Grey Knights Terminator Squad Unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by madels in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [PSYCHIC] abilities.

Enhancements.Name: Formidable Resolve
Enhancements.Description: Inquisitor model only. Improve the bearer’s Leadership and Wounds characteristics by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can sele friendly Battle-shocked unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

Enhancements.Name: Daemon Slayer
Enhancements.Description: Inquisitor model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons, those weapons have the [ANTI-DAEMON 3+] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Grimoire of True Names (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Inquisitor model only. While an enemy unit 9" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership charac of models in that unit by 1. In addition, while enemy Daemon unit is within 9" of the bearer time a model in that Daemon unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Gift of the Prescient
Enhancements.Description: Inquisitor model only. Once per battle, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. When doing so, you must target a Grey Knights Terminator Squad unit from your army, and when Using that Stratagem, that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is 6" away from all enemy units.

Rule.Title: AT ALL COSTS
Rule.Text:
Eliminate At All Costs
Select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an Agents of the Imperium model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Acquire At All Costs
Select one objective marker on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, while an Agents of the Imperium unit from your army is within range of that objective marker, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1 and models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

Stratagems.Name: VIOLENT ACQUISITION
Stratagems.Category: IMPERIALIS FLEET - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1], [LANCE] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

Stratagems.Name: MASTERS OF THE VOID
Stratagems.Category: IMPERIALIS FLEET - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Voidfarers Character unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each Agents of the Imperium unit from your army that is arriving from Strategic Reserves this turn can be set up within your opponent's deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

Stratagems.Name: CLOSE-QUARTERS BARRAGE
Stratagems.Category: IMPERIALIS FLEET - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Voidfarers unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: EMPEROR'S WILL
Stratagems.Category: IMPERIALIS FLEET - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movernent phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: DISPLACER FIELD
Stratagems.Category: IMPERIALIS FLEET - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium Character unit from your army (excluding Officio Assassinorium units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save and, after the attacking unit has resolved its attacks, unless your unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" (when doing so, models in this unit move as if they  have the Fly keyword).

Stratagems.Name: SELFLESS BODYGUARD
Stratagems.Category: IMPERIALIS FLEET - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected  its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium Attached unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack with the [PRECISION] ability is allocated to a Character model in your unit, if there are one or more Bodyguard models in your unit, roll one D6: on a 2+, that attack is allocated to a Bodyguard model of your choice in your unit instead.

Enhancements.Name: Digital Weapons
Enhancements.Description: Agents of the Imperium model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, roll three D6: for each 4+, one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer suffers 1 mortal wound. Mortal wounds inflicted by this Enhancement are allocated as if they had the [PRECISION] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Clandestine Operation
Enhancements.Description: Agents of the Imperium model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three Agents of the Imperium Infantry units from your army (excluding Grey Knights Terminator Squad units) - those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

Enhancements.Name: Fleetmaster
Enhancements.Description: Voidfarers model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Violent Acquisition, Masters of the Void or Close-quarters Barrage Stratagems for 0CP.

Enhancements.Name: Combat Landers
Enhancements.Description: Voidfarers model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations Step, you can select up to three Voidfarers units from your army - those unit the Deep Strike ability.

Rule.Title: EXTREMIS SANCTION
Rule.Text:
Officio Assassinorum units from your army can use the Overkill, Soulless Horror and Shieldbreaker abilities twice per battle, instead of once per battle (but cannot use such an ability more than once in the same battle round). 

When mustering your army, each Officio Assassinorum unit from your army has the relevant Extremis ability shown on the right, and you must increase the points cost of each of those units by the amount shown. If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

Stratagems.Name: Prime Target
Stratagems.Category: VEILED BLADE ELIMINATION FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a Character unit, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If that attack is made by an Officio Assassinorum model and it targets the enemy Warlord, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

Stratagems.Name: Hyperstimms
Stratagems.Category: VEILED BLADE ELIMINATION FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium Character unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit. In addition, if it is an Eversor Assassin unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

Stratagems.Name: Will‑sapping Salvo
Stratagems.Category: VEILED BLADE ELIMINATION FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, if it is a Culexus Assassin unit, until the end of the phase, change the Damage characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit to 3.

Stratagems.Name: Orbital Oversight
Stratagems.Category: VEILED BLADE ELIMINATION FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18", or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6".

Stratagems.Name: Blind Grenades
Stratagems.Category: VEILED BLADE ELIMINATION FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium Grenades or Vindicare Assassin unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit, or, if your unit is a Vindicare Assassin, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit instead.

Stratagems.Name: Ensnaring Trap
Stratagems.Category: VEILED BLADE ELIMINATION FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Agents of the Imperium Infantry unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can declare a charge. When doing so, you must select one or more of those enemy units as the targets of that charge, and your unit does not receive a Charge bonus this turn. In addition, if it is a Callidus Assassin unit and it makes a Charge move as a result of this Stratagem, until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Decoy Targets
Enhancements.Description: Callidus Assassin models only. Twice per battle, in your Movement phase, you can select one other friendly Infantry model that is on the battlefield and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and this model is removed from the battlefield and set up again as close as possible to where that destroyed model was and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. This ability cannot be used more than once in the same battle round.

Enhancements.Name: Esoteric Explosives
Enhancements.Description: Culexus Assassin models only. Each time this model is targeted with the Grenades Stratagem, 1 mortal wound is inflicted for each D6 roll of 3+ instead of for each 4+.

Enhancements.Name: Intraneural Biotech
Enhancements.Description:
Eversor Assassin models only. You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, regardless of any other uses of that stratagem this phase. If you do:
▪ That use is -1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that stratagem on other units this phase.

Enhancements.Name: Micromelta Rounds
Enhancements.Description: Vindicare Assassin models only. This model’s exitus rifle has the [ANTI‑MONSTER 4+] and [ANTI‑VEHICLE 4+] abilities.

ArmyRules.Title: ASSIGNED AGENTS
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Agents of the Imperium, then in the  Select Detachment Rules step, you can select one of the available Detachments from this book as normal.

If your Army Faction is not Agents of the Imperium, but every model in your army has the Imperium keyword, you can include Agents of the Imperium units in your army even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. In this case, the maximum number of Agents of the Imperium units you can include in your army depends on the battle size, as shown below.

	▪ Incursion - 1 Retinue unit - 1 Character unit - 1 Requisitioned unit
	▪ Strike Force - 2 Retinue units - 2 Character units - 1 Requisitioned unit
	▪ Onslaught - 3 Retinue units - 3 Character units - 2 Requisitioned unit

Note that you can include Agents of the Imperium Dedicated Transport units in such an army as normal, but each unit must start the battle with one or more units embarked within it, or it cannot be deployed for that battle and will count  as having been destroyed during the first battle round.

ArmyRules.Title: KILL TEAM
ArmyRules.Text:
Each time an attack targets this unit, if it contains models with different Toughness characteristics, until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, use the Toughness characteristic of the majority of the models in that unit when determining what roll is required for that attack to successfully wound. If two or more Toughness characteristics are tied for majority, use the highest value.

 For the purposes of determining which models in this unit can embark within a Transport, Kill Team Terminator models, Kill Team Outrider models, Kill Team Biker models and models equipped with a jump pack each take up the space of 2 models, but can otherwise embark within any Transport their unit can embark within, even though similar models in other units have the Terminator, Mounted or Jump Pack keywords.

For the purposes of interacting with terrain features, all models in units with this ability are considered Infantry models, even though similar models in other units may have the Mounted or Jump Pack keywords.

Designer’s Note: While the abstractions in the above rule cause some models to behave differently to similar models in other units, they are designed to minimise complicated movement, Transport and Benefit of Cover rules.
